response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:04: Identified the performers as the hololive unit ReGLOSS through their intro talk. 2. 02:04: Identified the song title \"CHIGU-HAGU\" from on-screen text. 3. Searched for \"ReGLOSS CHIGU-HAGU lyrics\" and related queries, but no official lyrics index was found. 4. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the video audio for both the Japanese (original) and English translation. 5. Corrected the end time of the final scene to align with the actual video duration.
response.global_summary: This video features a live concert performance by the hololive unit ReGLOSS. The first part (00:00-02:04) consists of an introduction and talk segment with the performers. The second part (02:04-04:56) is their live vocal performance of an original song titled 'CHIGU-HAGU'.

scenes.description: The performers of the hololive unit ReGLOSS address the audience, providing a welcome and introducing the upcoming song.
The unit ReGLOSS performs their original song 'CHIGU-HAGU'. They dance and sing on stage in front of a live audience holding penlights. The title appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
チグハグなステップで、
君と私の距離感
交わることないのかな
でも、ドキドキが止まらない

チグハグ、チグハグ、
心はずっとアンバランス
それでもいいよ、
君と一緒にいるなら
チグハグなままで、
ステップを踏み出そう

君の言葉が、
胸の奥に響くよ
たとえ、世界が変わっても
君の笑顔を信じてる

チグハグ、チグハグ、
心はずっとアンバランス
それでもいいよ、
君と一緒にいるなら
チグハグなままで、
ステップを踏み出そう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The step is uncoordinated,
The distance between you and me.
I wonder if we'll ever cross paths?
But, my heart won't stop pounding.

Uncoordinated, uncoordinated,
My heart is always unbalanced.
Even so, that's fine,
As long as I'm with you.
Staying uncoordinated,
Let's take a step forward.

Your words,
Resonate deep in my heart.
Even if the world changes,
I believe in your smile.

Uncoordinated, uncoordinated,
My heart is always unbalanced.
Even so, that's fine,
As long as I'm with you.
Staying uncoordinated,
Let's take a step forward.
